description: An associate discovers a liquid spill on the floor and needs to report it so it can be cleaned up.

nodes.task_description: Place a 'wet floor' sign over the spill to warn customers.

expected_outcome.value: The immediate hazard is marked to prevent accidents.

nodes.task_description: Use the store communication device to report the spill and its location to the manager on duty.

expected_outcome.value: The manager is made aware of the situation.

nodes.task_description: A task is created in the task management system for 'Clean up spill in Aisle 3' and assigned for immediate action.

expected_outcome.value: The hazard is formally logged and assigned for resolution.
